nodes.name: Leaden honeyeater
nodes.summary: Leaden honeyeater（Ptiloprora plumbea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Leaden honeyeater。

nodes.name: Ptiloprora
nodes.summary: Ptiloprora（Ptiloprora）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Leaden honeyeater、Yellowish-streaked honeyeater、Rufous-sided honeyeater等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Leaden honeyeater
nodes.summary: The leaden honeyeater (Ptiloprora plumbea) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The leaden honeyeater (Ptiloprora plumbea) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands.
